message:
refactor: remove dead code and fix double-click timeout

- Remove unused refresh/refreshLegacy functions (screencast handles updates)
- Remove copySelectionToClipboard and extractSelectionFromResult (unused)
- Remove injectClipboardInterceptor no-op (handled by clipboard_polyfill.js)
- Remove unused scroll_api import
- Fix double-click timeout from 1000ms to 400ms (standard OS default)

files.patch:
@@ -114,7 +114,7 @@ pub const MouseEventBus = struct {
     debug_enabled: bool,
 
     const TICK_INTERVAL_NS = 66 * std.time.ns_per_ms; // ~15fps
-    const DOUBLE_CLICK_TIME_MS = 1000; // max time between clicks for double-click (generous for latency)
+    const DOUBLE_CLICK_TIME_MS = 400; // max time between clicks for double-click (standard OS default)
     const DOUBLE_CLICK_DISTANCE = 15; // max pixel distance for double-click
 
     pub fn init(
